shots.title: Scaffold slope-loop directory with agent guide skill

hazards.description: HandicapCard property access wrong — used current/trend instead of last_5/last_10/all_time.handicap. Required immediate fix commit.

bunker_locations: HandicapCard API uses last_5/last_10/all_time nested objects, not flat current/trend fields — always verify core type shapes before consuming
Temporal weighting with recency decay requires careful threshold tuning — dynamic ceil(N * 0.1) scales better than fixed thresholds
yardage_book_updates: slope-loop/analyze-scorecards.ts mines scorecard data → analysis.json + backlog.json with 5 strategy types (hardening, testing, cleanup, docs, meta)
slope-loop/model-selector.ts reads *-models.jsonl for data-driven model tier recommendations with cost-per-success
slope-loop/dashboard.ts generates static HTML with handicap trends, model rates, escalation stats, cost tracking
slope-loop/slope-loop-guide/SKILL.md is the agent guide skill with YAML frontmatter following Agent Skills spec
course_management_notes: Bogey from HandicapCard property access miss — required a fix commit (28f32d4) immediately after the initial implementation
Analysis of 39 scorecards showed handicap 0 (improving), 100% club success rates, 'rough' as sole recurring hazard
Generated 4-sprint backlog covers hardening, cleanup, documentation, and meta strategies from mined scorecard data
